span_mappings.nl_span: exact Pisano period π(9) = 24 as matrix order: F^k = I iff 24 | k

formal_statement:
theorem fib_mat_pisano_9 :
    (∀ k : Fin 24, k.val ≠ 0 → fib_mat ^ k.val ≠ 1) ∧ fib_mat ^ 24 = 1
natural_language_claim: The exact Pisano period π(9) = 24, stated algebraically: the smallest k > 0 with F^k = I in M₂(ZMod 9) is k = 24. This is the matrix-ring proof of the exact Pisano period.
